title: Elizabeth Linnell
compiled_truth: Elizabeth Linnell is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-08-29 to 2002-05-06), Elizabeth Linnell sent 70 and received 900 emails, totalling 970 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (35), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (29), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (16), [Maureen Mcvicker](people/maureen-mcvicker) (14), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (14). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_budget, 2001_prc__midyear, 2002_budget, bankruptcy, budget, california.
